solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden;\n  }\n  .signoff-header {\n    background: var(--navy); color: var(--gold);\n    padding: 7px 12px; font-size: 7.5pt; letter-spacing: 2px;\n margin-top: 22px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);\n    padding-top: 5px; font-size: 7.5pt; color: var(--muted);\n  }\n\n  /* ─── CHECKLIST ─── */\n  .check-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; padding: 5px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 8.5pt; }\n  .check-num { color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; min-width: 18px; }\n  .check-text { flex: 1; }\n class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 1</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Executive Summary</div>\n    <p>This document is the official project handoff from Bettroi FZE to Headz Hair Fixing Studio (\"HITS\") for the Headz Virtual Hairstyle Try-On Application.</p>\n    <p>The project has been completed in full, financial obligations have been settled, and payment has been received. Full ownership of the source code, database, deployment infrastructure, and all related intellectual property is hereby transferred to HITS.</p>\n    <div class=\"note-box\">\n      <div class=\"note-label\">Project Status — Complete</div>\n      <p>All deliverables have been met. Source code, database access, deployment credentials and this documentation are transferred to Headz Hair Fixing Studio.</p>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"note-box\" style=\"border-left-color: var(--navy);\">\n      <div class=\"note-label\" style=\"color: var(--navy);\">Scope Note</div>\n      <p>This document only describes features, components and styles that are actually wired into the live UI. Any files, presets or helper utilities that exist in the repository but are not reachable from the running application have been omitted intentionally to keep the handoff accurate.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <h2>Scope of Handoff</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th>Details</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td>Source Code</td><td>Complete React + TypeScript codebase</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Delivered</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Database</td><td>Supabase (PostgreSQL) — users, generations, otp_codes</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Delivered</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Deployment</td><td>Vercel production deployment with CI/CD from Git</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Delivered</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>AI Integration</td><td>Google Gemini 2.5 Flash Image</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Configured</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Super Admin Dashboard</td><td>Super Admin panel with full analytics</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Delivered</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Documentation</td><td>This handoff document &amp; inline source comments</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Delivered</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Git Repository</td><td>Full version history (46 commits)</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Delivered</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <h2>2. Application Overview</h2>\n    <p>Headz is an AI-powered virtual hairstyle try-on application. Users upload or capture a photo, choose from a curated catalog of hairstyles, and instantly preview how those styles would look on them. The transformation is performed by Google Gemini image generation.</p>\n\n    <h3>Core User Flow (as implemented in the UI)</h3>\n    <p>User lands on the marketing home page and starts a free try-on → uploads a photo from their device or captures one via webcam → selects a gender (male / female) and picks a hairstyle, or enters a free-form custom AI prompt → image is sent to Google Gemini → result is returned, watermarked and displayed beside the original via a before/after comparison slider. Free users get 3 generations (session-based). Registered, approved users get unlimited generations without watermark on download.</p>\n\n    <h3>Main Tabs in the Application</h3>\n    <p><strong>Virtual Mirror</strong> — pick a hairstyle from the 20 curated presets and preview. &nbsp;|&nbsp; <strong>AI Generator</strong> — free-form custom prompt input for unique hairstyles. &nbsp;|&nbsp; <strong>Gallery</strong> — personal history of generated styles (requires account).</p>\n\n    <h3>Super Admin</h3>\n    <p>Super Admin dashboard — full analytics with charts, user approval workflow, user management, custom prompt history, favourite hairstyle breakdown, Excel export, and weekly / monthly trend reporting.</p>\n\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <span class=\"pf-left\">Bettroi FZE · DTEC-51432</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-confid\">Confidential — Bettroi FZE</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-right\">Page 2</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════ PAGE 4 — TECH STACK ═══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"page-header\">\n    <div class=\"ph-left\">\n      <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:3px;\">\n      <span class=\"ph-product\">HEADZ</span>\n    </div>\n    <span class=\"ph-right\">Project Handoff Document · BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-body\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 3</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Technology Stack</div>\n    <div class=\"section-subtitle\">All libraries, frameworks and services powering the live application</div>\n\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Layer</th><th>Technology</th><th>Version</th><th>Purpose</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td>Frontend</td><td>React</td><td class=\"td-code\">19.1.1</td><td>UI framework</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Language</td><td>TypeScript</td><td class=\"td-code\">5.8.2</td><td>Type-safe development</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Build Tool</td><td>Vite</td><td class=\"td-code\">6.2.0</td><td>Fast bundler with HMR</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Styling</td><td>Tailwind CSS</td><td class=\"td-code\">4.1.12</td><td>Utility-first CSS</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Routing</td><td>React Router</td><td class=\"td-code\">7.8.2</td><td>Client-side routing</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Database</td><td>Supabase (PostgreSQL)</td><td class=\"td-code\">2.44.4</td><td>Backend-as-a-Service</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>AI Engine</td><td>Google Gemini (@google/genai)</td><td class=\"td-code\">1.16.0</td><td>Image transformation</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Auth</td><td>Google OAuth 2.0 (@react-oauth/google)</td><td class=\"td-code\">0.13.4</td><td>Primary sign-in</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Charts</td><td>Recharts</td><td class=\"td-code\">3.7.0</td><td>Super Admin analytics dashboards</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Export</td><td>XLSX (SheetJS)</td><td class=\"td-code\">0.18.5</td><td>Excel data export</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Deployment</td><td>Vercel</td><td class=\"td-code\">—</td><td>Hosting &amp; CDN</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <div class=\"note-box\">\n      <div class=\"note-label\">Note — Single AI Provider</div>\n      <p>The production AI pipeline uses Google Gemini only. No alternative image-generation providers are wired into the live application.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-top:14px;\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 4</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Project Structure &amp; File Map</div>\n    <div class=\"section-subtitle\">Only files reachable from the running by the UI</span>\n│   ├── <span class=\"dir\">SuperAdmin/</span>\n│   │   ├── HomeTab.tsx              <span class=\"comment\">Stats &amp; charts</span>\n│   │   ├── UsersTab.tsx             <span upload</span>\n│   ├── CameraCapture.tsx            <span class=\"comment\">Webcam capture</span>\n│   ├── Gallery.tsx                  <span class=\"comment\">Saved styles tab</span>\n│   ├──       <span class=\"comment\">Profile edit</span>\n│   ├── Loader.tsx                   <span class=\"comment\">Spinner</span>\n│   ├── SuperAdminLogin.tsx / SuperAdminDashboard.tsx / SuperAdminRoute.tsx\n│   ├── PrivacyPolicy.tsx\n│   └── TermsOfService.tsx\n├── <span class=\"dir\">contexts/</span>\n│   └── AuthContext.tsx              <span class=\"comment\">Auth state management</span>\n├── <span class=\"dir\">services/</span>\n│   ├── supabaseService.ts           <span class=\"comment\">Database operations</span>\n│   ├── geminiService.ts             <span class=\"comment\">Google Gemini integration</span>\n│   ├── imageUtils.ts                <span class=\"comment\">Image helpers</span>\n│   ├── watermark.ts                 <span class=\"comment\">Image watermarking</span>\n├── App.tsx                          <span class=\"comment\">Root with routing</span>\n├── types.ts                         <span class=\"comment\">TypeScript interfaces</span>\n├── constants.ts                     <span class=\"comment\">Hairstyle catalog</span>\n├── vite.config.ts / vercel.json / package.json\n└── *.sql                            <span class=\"comment\">4 database setup scripts</span>\n    </div>\n\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <span class=\"pf-left\">Bettroi FZE · DTEC-51432</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-confid\">Confidential — Bettroi FZE</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-right\">Page 3</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════ PAGE 5 — FEATURES ═══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"page-header\">\n    <div class=\"ph-left\">\n      <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:3px;\">\n      <span class=\"ph-product\">HEADZ</span>\n    </div>\n    <span class=\"ph-right\">Project Handoff Document · BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-body\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 5</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Key Features &amp; Pages</div>\n\n    <h2>5.1 Application Routes</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Route</th><th>Component</th><th>Description</th><th>Access</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">/</td>\n          <td>LandingPage</td>\n          <td>Marketing home with demo video</td>\n          <td><span class=\"td-tag tag-public\">Public</span></td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">/app</td>\n          <td>HairstyleApp</td>\n          <td>Main virtual try-on application</td>\n          <td><span class=\"td-tag tag-public\">Public / Registered</span></td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">/privacy</td>\n          <td>PrivacyPolicy</td>\n          <td>Privacy policy</td>\n          <td><span class=\"td-tag tag-public\">Public</span></td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">/terms</td>\n          <td>TermsOfService</td>\n          <td>Terms of service</td>\n          <td><span class=\"td-tag tag-public\">Public</span></td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">/super-admin/login</td>\n          <td>SuperAdminLogin</td>\n          <td>Super admin authentication</td>\n          <td><span class=\"td-tag tag-private\">Not Linked Publicly</span></td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">/super-admin</td>\n          <td>SuperAdminDashboard</td>\n          <td>Full analytics &amp; management</td>\n          <td><span class=\"td-tag tag-super\">Super Admin Only</span></td>\n        </tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <h2>5.2 User-Facing Features (actually visible in UI)</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Feature</th><th>Component</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Virtual Try-On</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">VirtualMirror.tsx</td>\n          <td>AI-powered hairstyle preview with before/after comparison slider</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Hairstyle Library</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">VirtualMirror.tsx</td>\n          <td>20 curated male &amp; female styles with tailored AI prompts</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>AI Custom Generator</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">AIStyleGenerator.tsx</td>\n          <td>Free-form prompt input with colour, length and texture options</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Photo Upload</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">Uploader.tsx</td>\n          <td>File upload from device</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Webcam Capture</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">CameraCapture.tsx</td>\n          <td>Live camera capture</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Before/After Slider</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">ImageComparator.tsx</td>\n          <td>Draggable divider to compare original vs generated</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Download &amp; Share</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">VirtualMirror.tsx</td>\n          <td>Save/share styled images (watermarked for free users)</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Personal Gallery</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">Gallery.tsx</td>\n          <td>History of generated styles for signed-in users</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Google Sign-In</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">AuthModal.tsx</td>\n          <td>One-click Google OAuth authentication</td>\n        </tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <h2>5.3 Super Admin Features</h2>\n    <p><strong>Super Admin Dashboard</strong> — full analytics with charts, user approval workflow, user management (block / unblock, promote / demote roles), custom prompt tracking, favourite hairstyle analysis, Excel export, weekly &amp; monthly trend analysis.</p>\n\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <span class=\"pf-left\">Bettroi FZE · DTEC-51432</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-confid\">Confidential — Bettroi FZE</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-right\">Page 4</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════ PAGE 6 — HAIRSTYLES ═══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"page-header\">\n    <div class=\"ph-left\">\n      <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:3px;\">\n      <span class=\"ph-product\">HEADZ</span>\n    </div>\n    <span class=\"ph-right\">Project Handoff Document · BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-body\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 6</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Available Hairstyles — 20 Styles in UI</div>\n    <div class=\"section-subtitle\">Complete hairstyle catalog rendered in the application. Each style has a dedicated thumbnail and a hand-tuned Gemini prompt that preserves facial features while only changing the hair region.</div>\n\n    <div class=\"hs-section-label\">Male Styles (10)</div>\n    <div class=\"hs-grid\">\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Curly Mullet<br><span class=\"gender\">Male</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">French Crop<br><span class=\"gender\">Male</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Undercut<br><span class=\"gender\">Male</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Pompadour / Quiff<br><span class=\"gender\">Male</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Undercut with Fade<br><span class=\"gender\">Male</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Buzz / Crew Cut<br><span class=\"gender\">Male</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Bollywood Layered<br><span class=\"gender\">Male</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Curly / Wavy Top<br><span class=\"gender\">Male</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">French Crop / Caesar<br><span class=\"gender\">Male</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Up Sweep<br><span class=\"gender\">Male</span></div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"hs-section-label\" style=\"margin-top:10px;\">Female Styles (10)</div>\n    <div class=\"hs-grid\">\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Long Layers<br><span class=\"gender\">Female</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Long Straight<br><span class=\"gender\">Female</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Bob Cut<br><span class=\"gender\">Female</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Wavy Beach<br><span class=\"gender\">Female</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Pixie Cut<br><span class=\"gender\">Female</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Braided Style<br><span class=\"gender\">Female</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Curly Natural<br><span class=\"gender\">Female</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Side Swept<br><span class=\"gender\">Female</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">High Bun<br><span class=\"gender\">Female</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Lob (Long Bob)<br><span class=\"gender\">Female</span></div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"note-box\" style=\"margin-top:10px;\">\n      <div class=\"note-label\">Catalog Location</div>\n      <p>Hairstyle definitions (id, display name, thumbnail path, Gemini prompt, gender) live in <code>AVAILABLE_HAIRSTYLES</code> inside <code>constants.ts</code>. Thumbnails live in <code>public/hairstyles/</code>. See Section 14 for editing instructions.</p>\n    </div>\n\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <span class=\"pf-left\">Bettroi FZE · DTEC-51432</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-confid\">Confidential — Bettroi FZE</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-right\">Page 5</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════ PAGE 7 — DATABASE ═══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"page-header\">\n    <div class=\"ph-left\">\n      <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:3px;\">\n      <span class=\"ph-product\">HEADZ</span>\n    </div>\n    <span class=\"ph-right\">Project Handoff Document · BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-body\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 7</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Database Schema</div>\n    <div class=\"section-subtitle\">Supabase (managed PostgreSQL) — three application tables plus one public storage bucket</div>\n\n    <h2>7.1 users</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Column</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">id</td><td>UUID (PK)</td><td>Primary key</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">email</td><td>TEXT UNIQUE</td><td>User email</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">password_hash</td><td>TEXT</td><td>Hashed password (email auth)</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">first_name, last_name, full_name</td><td>TEXT</td><td>Name fields</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">location</td><td>TEXT</td><td>User location</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">email_verified</td><td>BOOLEAN</td><td>Email verification status</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">is_admin</td><td>BOOLEAN</td><td>Admin role flag</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">is_super_admin</td><td>BOOLEAN</td><td>Super admin role flag</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">is_approved</td><td>BOOLEAN</td><td>Approval status (default: false)</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">auth_provider</td><td>TEXT</td><td>'email' or 'google'</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">download_count, share_count, generation_count, custom_prompt_count</td><td>INTEGER</td><td>Per-user action counters</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">created_at, updated_at, last_login_at</td><td>TIMESTAMPTZ</td><td>Audit timestamps</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <h2>7.2 generations</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Column</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">id</td><td>BIGINT (PK)</td><td>Auto-increment ID</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">user_id</td><td>UUID (FK)</td><td>References users.id</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">session_id</td><td>TEXT</td><td>Browser session ID</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">original_image_url</td><td>TEXT</td><td>Uploaded photo URL</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">styled_image_url</td><td>TEXT</td><td>AI-generated result URL</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">prompt</td><td>TEXT</td><td>AI prompt used</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">style_name</td><td>TEXT</td><td>Selected style name</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">gender</td><td>TEXT</td><td>Male / Female</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">is_favorite</td><td>BOOLEAN</td><td>User favourited this style</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">metadata</td><td>JSONB</td><td>Additional generation parameters</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">created_at</td><td>TIMESTAMPTZ</td><td>When generated</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <span class=\"pf-left\">Bettroi FZE · DTEC-51432</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-confid\">Confidential — Bettroi FZE</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-right\">Page 6</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════ PAGE 8 — DB CONT ═══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"page-header\">\n    <div class=\"ph-left\">\n      <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:3px;\">\n      <span class=\"ph-product\">HEADZ</span>\n    </div>\n    <span class=\"ph-right\">Project Handoff Document · BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-body\">\n    <h2>7.4 Storage</h2>\n    <p>Bucket <strong>generated-images</strong> (public) stores all uploaded and AI-generated images via Supabase Storage CDN.</p>\n\n    <h2>7.5 Database Setup Scripts (run in order)</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Order</th><th>Script</th><th>Purpose</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td>1</td><td class=\"td-code\">supabase-setup.sql</td><td>Creates all tables, indexes, RLS policies</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>2</td><td class=\"td-code\">add-analytics-columns.sql</td><td>Adds tracking counters (download, share, generation)</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>3</td><td class=\"td-code\">add-super-admin-column.sql</td><td>Adds is_super_admin column</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>4</td><td class=\"td-code\">get-super-admin-stats.sql</td><td>Creates analytics PostgreSQL function</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-top:14px;\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 8</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Service Layer &amp; Functions</div>\n    <div class=\"section-subtitle\">All backend operations use Supabase JS SDK and Google Gemini SDK directly from the client — no separate REST server</div>\n\n    <h2>8.1 AI — geminiService.ts</h2>\n    <p><strong>editImageWithGemini</strong> — send image + prompt to Gemini; retries with exponential backoff.<br>\n    <strong>preloadImageData</strong> — fetch and cache the source image for downstream calls.</p>\n\n    <h2>8.2 Generation Flow — supabaseService.ts</h2>\n    <p><strong>uploadImage</strong> — upload photo to the generated-images storage bucket.<br>\n    <strong>saveGeneration</strong> — persist a generation record to the database.<br>\n    <strong>dataURLtoFile</strong> — helper to convert a base64 data URL into a File for upload.<br>\n    <strong>getUserGenerations / deleteGeneration</strong> — power the personal Gallery tab.</p>\n\n    <h2>8.3 Analytics Counters</h2>\n    <p><strong>trackDownload, trackShare, trackGeneration, trackCustomPrompt</strong> — increment per-user counters in the users table.</p>\n\n    <h2>8.4 Super Admin Functions</h2>\n    <p><strong>getSuperAdminStats</strong> — aggregated platform metrics.<br>\n    <strong>getAllUsersWithAnalytics, searchUsersWithAnalytics</strong> — user list with tracking metrics.<br>\n    <strong>getWeeklyUserRegistrations / getMonthlyUserRegistrations</strong>.<br>\n    <strong>getWeeklyGenerations / getMonthlyGenerations</strong>.<br>\n    <strong>getPendingApprovalCount, getPendingUsers, approveUser, rejectUser</strong> — approval workflow.<br>\n    <strong>getUsersWithCustomPrompts, getUserCustomPrompts</strong> — custom prompt history.<br>\n    <strong>toggleUserAdmin, toggleUserBlocked</strong> — role and access management.</p>\n\n    <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-top:14px;\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 9</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Authentication &amp; User Roles</div>\n\n    <h2>9.1 Authentication Methods</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Method</th><th>Implementation</th><th>Details</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Google OAuth 2.0</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">@react-oauth/google</td>\n          <td>Primary login — auto-creates the user on first sign-in</td>\n        </tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <span class=\"pf-left\">Bettroi FZE · DTEC-51432</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-confid\">Confidential — Bettroi FZE</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-right\">Page 7</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════ PAGE 9 — AUTH + INTEGRATIONS ═══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"page-header\">\n    <div class=\"ph-left\">\n      <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:3px;\">\n      <span class=\"ph-product\">HEADZ</span>\n    </div>\n    <span class=\"ph-right\">Project Handoff Document · BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-body\">\n\n    <h2>9.2 User Roles &amp; Permissions</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Role</th><th>DB Flag</th><th>Capabilities</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Free (unauthenticated)</td>\n          <td>—</td>\n          <td>3 generations (session-based); watermarked downloads</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Registered User</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">is_approved=true</td>\n          <td>Unlimited generations, access to try-on, gallery and AI generator after approval; clean (un-watermarked) downloads</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Super Admin</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">is_super_admin=true</td>\n          <td>Full analytics, user management, approval, export, trend analysis</td>\n        </tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <h2>9.3 Session Management</h2>\n    <p>User data is stored in <code>localStorage</code> under the key <code>styleMyHair_user</code>. <code>AuthContext.tsx</code> provides global authentication state via the React Context API. Protected routes use <code>SuperAdminRoute.tsx</code> guard component.</p>\n    <div class=\"note-box\">\n      <div class=\"note-label\">First Super Admin Setup</div>\n      <p>After deploying, manually set <code>is_super_admin = true</code> for the first admin user directly in the Supabase SQL editor against the <code>users</code> table.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-top:14px;\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 10</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Third-Party Integrations</div>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Service</th><th>Purpose</th><th>Configuration Key</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Google Gemini AI</td>\n          <td>Core AI image transformation engine (model: gemini-2.5-flash-image)</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">GEMINI_API_KEY</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Supabase</td>\n          <td>PostgreSQL database, file storage, CDN</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Google OAuth</td>\n          <td>User authentication</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Vercel</td>\n          <td>Production hosting with global CDN</td>\n          <td>Vercel dashboard</td>\n        </tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n    <div class=\"note-box\">\n      <div class=\"note-label\">Single AI Provider</div>\n      <p>The live application uses Google Gemini only. No other image-generation services are billed, wired up or required to operate the product.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-top:14px;\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 11</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Environment &amp; Configuration</div>\n    <p>Configuration is provided via a <code>.env</code> file at the project root. Copy <code>.env.example</code> to <code>.env</code> and fill in the real values for the target environment.</p>\n\n    <h2>Required Keys</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Key</th><th>Service</th><th>Note</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">GEMINI_API_KEY</td><td>Google Gemini</td><td>AI image transformation</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">VITE_SUPABASE_URL</td><td>Supabase</td><td>Database endpoint</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY</td><td>Supabase</td><td>Public anon key</td></tr>\n        <tr><td class=\"td-code\">VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID</td><td>Google OAuth</td><td>OAuth client ID</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n    <div class=\"note-box\">\n      <div class=\"note-label\">Security Note</div>\n      <p>All variables prefixed with <code>VITE_</code> are exposed to the frontend at build time. Never store server-side-only secrets with this prefix. Actual credential values are shared separately via secure channel (see Section 16.2).</p>\n    </div>\n\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <span class=\"pf-left\">Bettroi FZE · DTEC-51432</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-confid\">Confidential — Bettroi FZE</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-right\">Page 8</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════ PAGE 10 — DEPLOYMENT ═══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"page-header\">\n    <div class=\"ph-left\">\n      <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:3px;\">\n      <span class=\"ph-product\">HEADZ</span>\n    </div>\n    <span class=\"ph-right\">Project Handoff Document · BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-body\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 12</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Deployment Guide</div>\n\n    <h2>12.1 Local Development</h2>\n    <p>1. Install dependencies with the project package manager: <code>npm install</code>.<br>\n    2. Copy <code>.env.example</code> to <code>.env</code> and fill in credentials.<br>\n    3. Start the Vite dev server — the app runs on <code>http://localhost:5173</code>.<br>\n    4. Build a production bundle with the build script; output goes to <code>dist/</code>.</p>\n\n    <h2>12.2 Vercel Production Deployment</h2>\n    <p>1. Connect the Git repository to Vercel.<br>\n    2. Set all environment variables under <strong>Vercel Dashboard &gt; Settings &gt; Environment Variables</strong>.<br>\n    3. Build command: <code>npm run build</code>. Output directory: <code>dist</code>. Framework preset: <strong>Vite</strong>.<br>\n    4. <code>vercel.json</code> handles SPA routing (all paths redirect to <code>index.html</code>) and static asset caching.</p>\n\n    <h2>12.3 Database Setup (Fresh Install)</h2>\n    <p>1. Create a new Supabase project and copy the Project URL and anon key into <code>.env</code>.<br>\n    2. In the Supabase SQL Editor, run the four setup scripts in order: <code>supabase-setup.sql</code>, <code>add-analytics-columns.sql</code>, <code>add-super-admin-column.sql</code>, <code>get-super-admin-stats.sql</code>.<br>\n    3. Create a public storage bucket named <code>generated-images</code>.<br>\n    4. Set the first super admin user via SQL (see Section 9.3).</p>\n\n    <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-top:16px;\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 13</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Testing &amp; Quality Assurance</div>\n    <p>The Headz application has been verified end-to-end using the Claude Code CLI (Anthropic's agentic coding assistant) as the primary QA harness throughout development. Every feature shipped in this repository was validated against the standard Claude CLI review pipeline before merge, covering type safety, build integrity, security, code quality and real user-path verification.</p>\n    <p>A dedicated Playwright end-to-end test suite of <strong>33 automated tests</strong> was written and executed via the Claude Code CLI. Tests ran across three browsers — Chrome, Mobile Chrome, and Mobile Safari — and covered the full critical path. All 33 tests passed in under 25 seconds, confirming stable, cross-browser functionality.</p>\n\n    <h2>Standard Claude CLI Checks Applied</h2>\n    <p style=\"font-size:8pt;line-height:1.7;\">\n      ✓ <strong>TypeScript type-check</strong> — <code>tsc --noEmit</code> runs after every edit with zero errors.<br>\n      ✓ <strong>Production build verification</strong> — <code>npm run build</code> must complete cleanly.<br>\n      ✓ <strong>Dead-code &amp; reachability audit</strong> — every component, service function, util and asset verified reachable.<br>\n      ✓ <strong>Security review</strong> — scan for hardcoded secrets, API keys, unsafe innerHTML, XSS vectors, OWASP Top-10.<br>\n      ✓ <strong>Code review</strong> — readability, function size, file size, nesting depth, error-handling.<br>\n      ✓ <strong>UI click-path verification</strong> — upload → style pick → generate → download/share, Google sign-in, Super Admin approval &amp; exports.<br>\n      ✓ <strong>Responsive &amp; mobile UX audit</strong> — layout, touch response, camera capture verified across mobile breakpoints.<br>\n      ✓ <strong>Regression check</strong> after each fix — related flows re-verified.<br>\n      ✓ <strong>Image &amp; asset integrity</strong> — every thumbnail in <code>constants.ts</code> confirmed present in <code>public/hairstyles/</code>.<br>\n      ✓ <strong>Route &amp; role guard checks</strong> — SuperAdminRoute verified to block unauthorised access.\n    </p>\n\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <span class=\"pf-left\">Bettroi FZE · DTEC-51432</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-confid\">Confidential — Bettroi FZE</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-right\">Page 9</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════ PAGE 11 — CONTENT MGT ═══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"page-header\">\n    <div class=\"ph-left\">\n      <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:3px;\">\n      <span class=\"ph-product\">HEADZ</span>\n    </div>\n    <span class=\"ph-right\">Project Handoff Document · BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-body\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 14</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Content Management</div>\n\n    <h2>14.1 Hairstyle Catalog</h2>\n    <p>All 20 hairstyles rendered by the UI are defined in <code>constants.ts</code> in the <code>AVAILABLE_HAIRSTYLES</code> list. Each style has the fields: <strong>id</strong> (unique identifier), <strong>name</strong> (display name), <strong>thumbnailUrl</strong> (path in <code>public/hairstyles/</code>), <strong>prompt</strong> (detailed Gemini prompt), <strong>gender</strong> (male or female), <strong>category</strong>.</p>\n\n    <h3>To Add a New Hairstyle</h3>\n    <p>1. Create a 300×300px PNG thumbnail.<br>\n    2. Save it to <code>public/hairstyles/your-style-name.png</code>.<br>\n    3. Add a new entry to <code>AVAILABLE_HAIRSTYLES</code> in <code>constants.ts</code>.<br>\n    4. Rebuild and redeploy.</p>\n\n    <h3>To Modify an Existing Style</h3>\n    <p>Change thumbnail: replace the image in <code>public/hairstyles/</code> keeping the same filename. Change AI behaviour: edit the <code>prompt</code> field in <code>constants.ts</code>.</p>\n\n    <h2>14.2 Landing Page Content</h2>\n    <p>Before/After images: <code>public/landing/Before1.JPG</code>, <code>After1.JPG</code>, etc.<br>\n    Demo video: <code>public/landing/demo.mp4</code>.<br>\n    To update, replace the files keeping the same filenames.</p>\n\n    <h2>14.3 Logo &amp; Branding</h2>\n    <p>Logo file: <code>public/logo.png</code> · Brand colour: <code>#E1262D</code> (Headz Red) · Favicon: <code>public/favicon.svg</code>.</p>\n\n    <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-top:14px;\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 15</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Maintenance &amp; Troubleshooting</div>\n\n    <h2>15.1 Common Tasks</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Task</th><th>How To</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td>Add new admin user</td><td>Super Admin &gt; Users Tab &gt; Toggle admin</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Approve new registrations</td><td>Super Admin &gt; Approve Requests Tab</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Block a user</td><td>Super Admin &gt; Users Tab &gt; Block button</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Export user data</td><td>Super Admin &gt; Users Tab &gt; Export (.xlsx download)</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>View generation analytics</td><td>Super Admin &gt; Home Tab &gt; Charts section</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Change Gemini AI model</td><td>Edit model name in <code>services/geminiService.ts</code></td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Edit a hairstyle prompt</td><td>Edit the relevant entry in <code>constants.ts</code> and redeploy</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <h2>15.2 Troubleshooting</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Issue</th><th>Likely Cause</th><th>Solution</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td>AI generation fails</td><td>Gemini API key invalid or expired</td><td>Check <code>GEMINI_API_KEY</code>, verify quota at Google AI Studio</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Google login not working</td><td>OAuth Client ID misconfigured</td><td>Verify <code>VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID</code> and authorised redirect URIs in Google Cloud Console</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Images not loading</td><td>Supabase storage bucket permissions</td><td>Verify <code>generated-images</code> bucket is set to Public</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Database connection fails</td><td>Supabase credentials</td><td>Verify <code>VITE_SUPABASE_URL</code> and <code>VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY</code></td></tr>\n        <tr><td>\"3 free tries\" limit hit</td><td>Session limit reached</td><td>User must register and be approved for unlimited access</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <span class=\"pf-left\">Bettroi FZE · DTEC-51432</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-confid\">Confidential — Bettroi FZE</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-right\">Page 10</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════ PAGE 12 — HANDOFF ═══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"page-header\">\n    <div class=\"ph-left\">\n      <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:3px;\">\n      <span class=\"ph-product\">HEADZ</span>\n    </div>\n    <span class=\"ph-right\">Project Handoff Document · BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-body\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 16</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Handoff Checklist &amp; Sign-Off</div>\n\n    <h2>16.1 Deliverables Checklist</h2>\n    <div class=\"check-row\"><span class=\"check-num\">1</span><span class=\"check-text\">Complete source code repository with version history (46 commits)</span><span class=\"check-ok\">✓</span></div>\n    <div class=\"check-row\"><span class=\"check-num\">2</span><span class=\"check-text\">Database schema and setup scripts (4 SQL files)</span><span class=\"check-ok\">✓</span></div>\n    <div class=\"check-row\"><span class=\"check-num\">3</span><span class=\"check-text\">Environment variable template (.env.example)</span><span class=\"check-ok\">✓</span></div>\n    <div class=\"check-row\"><span class=\"check-num\">4</span><span class=\"check-text\">Vercel deployment configuration</span><span class=\"check-ok\">✓</span></div>\n    <div class=\"check-row\"><span class=\"check-num\">5</span><span class=\"check-text\">All static assets (20 hairstyle thumbnails, landing page media, logo)</span><span class=\"check-ok\">✓</span></div>\n    <div class=\"check-row\"><span class=\"check-num\">6</span><span class=\"check-text\">Super Admin dashboard with full analytics</span><span class=\"check-ok\">✓</span></div>\n    <div class=\"check-row\"><span class=\"check-num\">7</span><span class=\"check-text\">Google OAuth integration</span><span class=\"check-ok\">✓</span></div>\n    <div class=\"check-row\"><span class=\"check-num\">8</span><span class=\"check-text\">Google Gemini AI integration</span><span class=\"check-ok\">✓</span></div>\n    <div class=\"check-row\"><span class=\"check-num\">9</span><span class=\"check-text\">This handoff documentation</span><span class=\"check-ok\">✓</span></div>\n    <div class=\"check-row\"><span class=\"check-num\">10</span><span class=\"check-text\">Financial settlement completed</span><span class=\"check-ok\">✓</span></div>\n\n    <h2>16.2 Credentials to Transfer</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Credential</th><th>Where to Find</th><th>Transfer Method</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td>Supabase Project URL &amp; Anon Key</td><td>Supabase Dashboard &gt; Settings &gt; API</td><td>Secure transfer</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Google Gemini API Key</td><td>Google AI Studio &gt; API Keys</td><td>Secure transfer</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Google OAuth Client ID</td><td>Google Cloud Console &gt; Credentials</td><td>Secure transfer</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Vercel Project Access</td><td>Vercel Dashboard &gt; Team Settings</td><td>Team invitation</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Git Repository Access</td><td>GitHub / GitLab &gt; Settings &gt; Access</td><td>Repository transfer</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n    <div class=\"note-box\">\n      <div class=\"note-label\">Security Notice</div>\n      <p>All credentials must be transferred via a secure channel (encrypted email or password manager). Bettroi FZE recommends rotating all API keys immediately after handoff.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <h2>16.3 Post-Handoff Recommendations</h2>\n    <p style=\"font-size:8.5pt;line-height:1.7;\">\n      • Rotate all API keys and credentials after receiving them.<br>\n      • Set up your own Google Cloud project for OAuth and Gemini billing.<br>\n      • Create your own Supabase project and migrate data if required.<br>\n      • Consider moving hairstyle definitions from <code>constants.ts</code> into a database table for easier non-developer editing.<br>\n      • Set up monitoring and error tracking (e.g. Sentry) for the production deployment.\n    </p>\n\n    <h2>Sign-Off</h2>\n    <p style=\"font-size:8.5pt;\">This document confirms that all project deliverables listed above have been completed and transferred. All financial obligations have been settled in full.</p>\n    <div class=\"signoff-grid\">\n      <div class=\"signoff-box\">\n        <div class=\"signoff-header\">Delivered By</div>\n        <div class=\"signoff-body\">\n          <p><strong>Bettroi FZE</strong></p>\n          <p>A5, Techno-Hub, DTEC</p>\n          <p>Dubai Silicon Oasis, Dubai, UAE</p>\n          <p>Trade License: DTEC-51432</p>\n          <div class=\"signoff-sig\">Authorized Signatory</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"signoff-box\">\n        <div class=\"signoff-header\">Received By</div>\n        <div class=\"signoff-body\">\n          <p><strong>Headz Hair Fixing Studio</strong></p>\n          <p>Royal Concorde Office Tower</p>\n          <p>Office No. 702, Riggat Al Buteen</p>\n          <p>Dubai, UAE</p>\n          <div class=\"signoff-sig\">Authorized Signatory</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <span class=\"pf-left\">Bettroi FZE · DTEC-51432</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-confid\">Confidential — Bettroi FZE</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-right\">Page 11</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- ═══════════════════════════════ LAST PAGE — FOOTER BAND ═══ -->\n<div class=\"page\" style=\"justify-content:flex-end;\">\n  <div style=\"flex:1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-direction:column; gap:8px;\">\n    <div style=\"color:var(--muted); font-size:8pt; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase;\">End of Document</div>\n    <div style=\"width:40px; height:3px; background:var(--gold); border-radius:2px;\"></div>\n    <div style=\"color:var(--muted); font-size:8pt;\">BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001 · Version 1.2 · 12 May 2026</div>\n  </div>\n  <div style=\"background:var(--navy); padding:16px 28px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;\">\n    <div>\n      <img src=\"data:image/png;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;\">\n      <div style=\"font-size:7.5pt; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-top:4px;\">admin@bettroi.com · bettroi.com · +971 54 714 8580</div>\n    </div>\n    <div style=\"text-align:right; font-size:7.5pt; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);\">\n      Confidential — Bettroi FZE<br>\n      A5, Techno-Hub, DTEC · Dubai Silicon Oasis, UAE\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n</body>\n</html>\n",

  "custom_html": "\n\n\n<meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n<meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\n<title>Headz — Project Handoff Document</title>\n<style>\n  :root {\n    --navy:  #1C2B4A;\n    --gold:  #C9A93F;\n    --text:  #374151;\n    --muted: #6B7280;\n    --border:#E5E7EB;\n    --bg:    #F8F9FB;\n  }\n  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }\n  body {\n    font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 10pt;\n    color: var(--text);\n    background: #e8e8e8;\n  }\n\n  /* ─── PAGE ─── */\n  .page {\n    width: 210mm;\n    height: 297mm;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    margin: 10px auto;\n    background: white;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    position: relative;\n  }\n  @media print {\n    body { background: white; }\n    .page { margin: 0; box-shadow: none; page-break-after: always; }\n    .page:last-child { page-break-after: avoid; }\n    @page { size: A4; margin: 0; }\n  }\n\n  /* ─── COVER ─── */\n  .cover {\n    background: var(--navy);\n    color: white;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    padding: 40px 44px 32px;\n  }\n  .cover-top { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }\n  .cover-accent {\n    width: 56px; height: 4px;\n    background: var(--gold);\n    border-radius: 2px;\n    margin-bottom: 36px;\n  }\n  .cover-badge {\n    font-size: 9pt;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    color: var(--gold);\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n  }\n  .cover-product {\n    font-size: 36pt;\n    font-weight: 900;\n    letter-spacing: 8px;\n    color: white;\n    margin-bottom: 6px;\n  }\n  .cover-subtitle {\n    font-size: 12pt;\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);\n    letter-spacing: 2px;\n    margin-bottom: 40px;\n  }\n  .cover-type {\n    font-size: 18pt;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: white;\n    margin-bottom: 4px;\n  }\n  .cover-divider { width: 100%; height: 1px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); margin: 20px 0; }\n  .cover-meta {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;\n    gap: 0;\n  }\n  .cover-meta-col {\n    padding: 0 16px;\n    border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);\n  }\n  .cover-meta-col:first-child { padding-left: 0; }\n  .cover-meta-col:last-child { border-right: none; }\n  .meta-label {\n    font-size: 7pt;\n    letter-spacing: 2px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);\n    margin-bottom: 4px;\n  }\n  .meta-value {\n    font-size: 9pt;\n    color: white;\n    font-weight: 600;\n  }\n  .meta-value-sm {\n    font-size: 8pt;\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);\n    line-height: 1.5;\n  }\n  .cover-bottom {\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: flex-end;\n  }\n  .cover-client-label {\n    font-size: 7pt;\n    letter-spacing: 2px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    color: var(--gold);\n    margin-bottom: 6px;\n  }\n  .cover-client-name {\n    font-size: 13pt;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: white;\n    margin-bottom: 4px;\n  }\n  .cover-client-addr {\n    font-size: 8.5pt;\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);\n    line-height: 1.6;\n  }\n  .cover-confid {\n    font-size: 7.5pt;\n    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);\n    letter-spacing: 1px;\n  }\n\n  /* ─── INNER PAGES ─── */\n  .page-header {\n    background: var(--navy);\n    padding: 12px 28px;\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: center;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n  }\n  .ph-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }\n  .ph-logo { height: 22px; object-fit: contain; }\n  .ph-product { font-size: 9pt; font-weight: 700; color: white; letter-spacing: 2px; }\n  .ph-right { font-size: 7.5pt; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }\n\n  .page-body {\n    flex: 1;\n    padding: 22px 28px 16px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n  }\n\n  .page-footer {\n    padding: 8px 28px;\n    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);\n    display: flex;\n    justify-content: space-between;\n    align-items: center;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n  }\n  .pf-left { font-size: 7pt; color: var(--muted); }\n  .pf-right { font-size: 7pt; color: var(--muted); }\n  .pf-confid {\n    font-size: 7pt;\n    color: var(--muted);\n    text-align: center;\n  }\n\n  /* ─── SECTION TITLES ─── */\n  .section-badge {\n    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px;\n    background: var(--navy); color: var(--gold);\n    font-size: 7.5pt; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 2px;\n    text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 10px 3px 8px;\n    border-radius: 3px; margin-bottom: 8px;\n  }\n  .section-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: var(--gold); border-radius: 50%; }\n  .section-title {\n    font-size: 14pt; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy);\n    margin-bottom: 4px;\n  }\n  .section-subtitle {\n    font-size: 9pt; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 12px;\n  }\n  h2 {\n    font-size: 11pt; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy);\n    margin: 14px 0 6px;\n    padding-bottom: 3px;\n    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gold);\n    display: inline-block;\n  }\n  h3 {\n    font-size: 9.5pt; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy);\n    margin: 10px 0 5px;\n  }\n  p { font-size: 9pt; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 6px; }\n\n  /* ─── TABLES ─── */\n  table {\n    width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;\n    font-size: 8.5pt; margin-bottom: 10px;\n  }\n  thead th {\n    background: var(--navy); color: var(--gold);\n    padding: 6px 8px; text-align: left;\n    font-size: 7.5pt; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase;\n    font-weight: 700;\n  }\n  tbody tr:nth-child(even) { background: var(--bg); }\n  tbody tr:hover { background: #f0f3f8; }\n  tbody td {\n    padding: 5.5px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);\n    vertical-align: top; line-height: 1.45;\n  }\n  .td-code { font-family: monospace; font-size: 8pt; color: var(--navy); }\n  .td-status-ok {\n    color: #059669; font-weight: 700; font-size: 8pt;\n  }\n  .td-check { color: #059669; font-weight: 700; }\n  .td-tag {\n    display: inline-block; padding: 1px 6px;\n    border-radius: 10px; font-size: 7pt; font-weight: 700;\n    letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n  }\n  .tag-public { background: #D1FAE5; color: #065F46; }\n  .tag-private { background: #FEF3C7; color: #92400E; }\n  .tag-admin { background: #DBEAFE; color: #1E40AF; }\n  .tag-super { background: #EDE9FE; color: #5B21B6; }\n\n  /* ─── NOTE BOXES ─── */\n  .note-box {\n    background: var(--bg);\n    border-left: 3px solid var(--gold);\n    padding: 8px 12px; margin: 8px 0;\n    border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;\n  }\n  .note-box p { margin: 0; font-size: 8.5pt; }\n  .note-label { font-size: 7.5pt; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 3px; }\n\n  /* ─── FILE TREE ─── */\n  .file-tree {\n    background: var(--navy);\n    color: #A5B4C8;\n    font-family: monospace; font-size: 7.5pt;\n    padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 4px;\n    line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 8px;\n  }\n  .file-tree .dir { color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; }\n  .file-tree .comment { color: #4B6380; }\n\n  /* ─── TOC ─── */\n  .toc-item {\n    display: flex; align-items: center;\n    padding: 5px 0; border-bottom: 1px dotted var(--border);\n    font-size: 9pt; color: var(--text);\n  }\n  .toc-num { color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; min-width: 28px; font-size: 9.5pt; }\n  .toc-title { flex: 1; }\n  .toc-page { color: var(--muted); font-size: 8.5pt; }\n\n  /* ─── SIGN OFF ─── */\n  .signoff-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; margin-top: 14px; }\n  .signoff-box {\n    border: 1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden;\n  }\n  .signoff-header {\n    background: var(--navy); color: var(--gold);\n    padding: 7px 12px; font-size: 7.5pt; letter-spacing: 2px;\n    text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700;\n  }\n  .signoff-body { padding: 10px 12px; }\n  .signoff-body p { font-size: 8.5pt; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 3px; }\n  .signoff-sig {\n    margin-top: 22px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);\n    padding-top: 5px; font-size: 7.5pt; color: var(--muted);\n  }\n\n  /* ─── CHECKLIST ─── */\n  .check-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; padding: 5px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 8.5pt; }\n  .check-num { color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; min-width: 18px; }\n  .check-text { flex: 1; }\n  .check-ok { color: #059669; font-weight: 700; font-size: 11pt; line-height: 1; }\n\n  /* ─── VERSION BADGE ─── */\n  .version-strip {\n    background: var(--bg);\n    border: 1px solid var(--border);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n    padding: 6px 12px;\n    display: flex; gap: 20px;\n    margin-bottom: 10px;\n  }\n  .vs-item { font-size: 8pt; }\n  .vs-label { color: var(--muted); margin-right: 4px; }\n  .vs-val { font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); }\n\n  /* hairstyle grid */\n  .hs-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(6,1fr); gap: 6px; margin-top: 6px; }\n  .hs-cell {\n    background: var(--bg); border: 1px solid var(--border);\n    border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 4px;\n    text-align: center; font-size: 7.5pt; color: var(--text);\n    line-height: 1.3;\n  }\n  .hs-cell .gender { font-size: 7pt; color: var(--muted); }\n  .hs-section-label { font-size: 8pt; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin: 8px 0 4px; }\n</style>\n\n\n\n<!-- admin@bettroi.com\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════ PAGE 3 — EXEC SUMMARY ═══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"page-header\">\n    <div class=\"ph-left\">\n      <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:3px;\">\n      <span class=\"ph-product\">HEADZ</span>\n    </div>\n    <span class=\"ph-right\">Project Handoff Document · BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-body\">\n\n    <div class=\"version-strip\">\n      <div class=\"vs-item\"><span class=\"vs-label\">Doc No:</span><span class=\"vs-val\">BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001</span></div>\n      <div class=\"vs-item\"><span class=\"vs-label\">Version:</span><span class=\"vs-val\">1.2</span></div>\n      <div class=\"vs-item\"><span class=\"vs-label\">Date:</span><span class=\"vs-val\">12 May 2026</span></div>\n      <div class=\"vs-item\"><span class=\"vs-label\">Status:</span><span class=\"vs-val\" style=\"color:#059669;\">Final — Project Complete</span></div>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"section-badge\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 1</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Executive Summary</div>\n    <p>This document is the official project handoff from Bettroi FZE to Headz Hair Fixing Studio (\"HITS\") for the Headz Virtual Hairstyle Try-On Application.</p>\n    <p>The project has been completed in full, financial obligations have been settled, and payment has been received. Full ownership of the source code, database, deployment infrastructure, and all related intellectual property is hereby transferred to HITS.</p>\n    <div class=\"note-box\">\n      <div class=\"note-label\">Project Status — Complete</div>\n      <p>All deliverables have been met. Source code, database access, deployment credentials and this documentation are transferred to Headz Hair Fixing Studio.</p>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"note-box\" style=\"border-left-color: var(--navy);\">\n      <div class=\"note-label\" style=\"color: var(--navy);\">Scope Note</div>\n      <p>This document only describes features, components and styles that are actually wired into the live UI. Any files, presets or helper utilities that exist in the repository but are not reachable from the running application have been omitted intentionally to keep the handoff accurate.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <h2>Scope of Handoff</h2>\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th>Details</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td>Source Code</td><td>Complete React + TypeScript codebase</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Delivered</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Database</td><td>Supabase (PostgreSQL) — users, generations, otp_codes</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Delivered</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Deployment</td><td>Vercel production deployment with CI/CD from Git</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Delivered</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>AI Integration</td><td>Google Gemini 2.5 Flash Image</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Configured</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Super Admin Dashboard</td><td>Super Admin panel with full analytics</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Delivered</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Documentation</td><td>This handoff document &amp; inline source comments</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Delivered</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Git Repository</td><td>Full version history (46 commits)</td><td class=\"td-status-ok\">Delivered</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <h2>2. Application Overview</h2>\n    <p>Headz is an AI-powered virtual hairstyle try-on application. Users upload or capture a photo, choose from a curated catalog of hairstyles, and instantly preview how those styles would look on them. The transformation is performed by Google Gemini image generation.</p>\n\n    <h3>Core User Flow (as implemented in the UI)</h3>\n    <p>User lands on the marketing home page and starts a free try-on → uploads a photo from their device or captures one via webcam → selects a gender (male / female) and picks a hairstyle, or enters a free-form custom AI prompt → image is sent to Google Gemini → result is returned, watermarked and displayed beside the original via a before/after comparison slider. Free users get 3 generations (session-based). Registered, approved users get unlimited generations without watermark on download.</p>\n\n    <h3>Main Tabs in the Application</h3>\n    <p><strong>Virtual Mirror</strong> — pick a hairstyle from the 20 curated presets and preview. &nbsp;|&nbsp; <strong>AI Generator</strong> — free-form custom prompt input for unique hairstyles. &nbsp;|&nbsp; <strong>Gallery</strong> — personal history of generated styles (requires account).</p>\n\n    <h3>Super Admin</h3>\n    <p>Super Admin dashboard — full analytics with charts, user approval workflow, user management, custom prompt history, favourite hairstyle breakdown, Excel export, and weekly / monthly trend reporting.</p>\n\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <span class=\"pf-left\">Bettroi FZE · DTEC-51432</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-confid\">Confidential — Bettroi FZE</span>\n    <span class=\"pf-right\">Page 2</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════ PAGE 4 — TECH STACK ═══ -->\n<div class=\"page\">\n  <div class=\"page-header\">\n    <div class=\"ph-left\">\n      <img src=\"data:image/jpeg;base64,\" style=\"height:22px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:3px;\">\n      <span class=\"ph-product\">HEADZ</span>\n    </div>\n    <span class=\"ph-right\">Project Handoff Document · BTRI-HITS-HO-2026-001</span>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-body\">\n    <div class=\"section-badge\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 3</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Technology Stack</div>\n    <div class=\"section-subtitle\">All libraries, frameworks and services powering the live application</div>\n\n    <table>\n      <thead><tr><th>Layer</th><th>Technology</th><th>Version</th><th>Purpose</th></tr></thead>\n      <tbody>\n        <tr><td>Frontend</td><td>React</td><td class=\"td-code\">19.1.1</td><td>UI framework</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Language</td><td>TypeScript</td><td class=\"td-code\">5.8.2</td><td>Type-safe development</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Build Tool</td><td>Vite</td><td class=\"td-code\">6.2.0</td><td>Fast bundler with HMR</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Styling</td><td>Tailwind CSS</td><td class=\"td-code\">4.1.12</td><td>Utility-first CSS</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Routing</td><td>React Router</td><td class=\"td-code\">7.8.2</td><td>Client-side routing</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Database</td><td>Supabase (PostgreSQL)</td><td class=\"td-code\">2.44.4</td><td>Backend-as-a-Service</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>AI Engine</td><td>Google Gemini (@google/genai)</td><td class=\"td-code\">1.16.0</td><td>Image transformation</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Auth</td><td>Google OAuth 2.0 (@react-oauth/google)</td><td class=\"td-code\">0.13.4</td><td>Primary sign-in</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Charts</td><td>Recharts</td><td class=\"td-code\">3.7.0</td><td>Super Admin analytics dashboards</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Export</td><td>XLSX (SheetJS)</td><td class=\"td-code\">0.18.5</td><td>Excel data export</td></tr>\n        <tr><td>Deployment</td><td>Vercel</td><td class=\"td-code\">—</td><td>Hosting &amp; CDN</td></tr>\n      </tbody>\n    </table>\n\n    <div class=\"note-box\">\n      <div class=\"note-label\">Note — Single AI Provider</div>\n      <p>The production AI pipeline uses Google Gemini only. No alternative image-generation providers are wired into the live application.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"section-badge\" style=\"margin-top:14px;\"><span class=\"section-badge-dot\"></span>Section 4</div>\n    <div class=\"section-title\">Project Structure &amp; File Map</div>\n    <div class=\"section-subtitle\">Only files reachable from the running UI are listed below</div>\n\n    <div class=\"file-tree\">\n<span class=\"dir\">Headz/</span>\n├── <span class=\"dir\">components/</span>               <span class=\"comment\">← React components used by the UI</span>\n│   ├── <span class=\"dir\">SuperAdmin/</span>\n│   │   ├── HomeTab.tsx              <span class=\"comment\">Stats &amp; charts</span>\n│   │   ├── UsersTab.tsx             <span class=\"comment\">User management</span>\n│   │   ├── UserTable.tsx            <span class=\"comment\">Paginated user list</span>\n│   │   ├── UserSearchBar.tsx        <span class=\"comment\">Filter &amp; search</span>\n│   │   ├── CustomPromptsTab.tsx     <span class=\"comment\">Custom prompt history</span>\n│   │   ├── ApproveRequestsTab.tsx   <span class=\"comment\">Approval workflow</span>\n│   │   ├── ExportModal.tsx          <span class=\"comment\">Excel export modal</span>\n│   │   ├── StatCard.tsx             <span class=\"comment\">Metric card widget</span>\n│   │   └── SuperAdminSidebar.tsx    <span class=\"comment\">Navigation</span>\n│   ├── LandingPage.tsx              <span class=\"comment\">Marketing page</span>\n│   ├── HairstyleApp.tsx             <span class=\"comment\">Main app container (tabs)</span>\n│   ├── Header.tsx                   <span class=\"comment\">Top navigation</span>\n│   ├── TabSelector.tsx              <span class=\"comment\">Virtual Mirror / AI / Gallery tabs</span>\n│   ├── VirtualMirror.tsx            <span class=\"comment\">Try-on + style grid</span>\n│   ├── ImageComparator.tsx          <span class=\"comment\">Before/after slider</span>\n│   ├── AIStyleGenerator.tsx         <span class=\"comment\">Custom prompt input</span>\n│   ├── Uploader.tsx                 <span class=\"comment\">File upload</span>\n│   ├── CameraCapture.tsx            <span class=\"comment\">Webcam capture</span>\n│   ├── Gallery.tsx                  <span class=\"comment\">Saved styles tab</span>\n│   ├── AuthModal.tsx                <span class=\"comment\">Login / signup dialog</span>\n│   ├── AuthWrapper.tsx              <span class=\"comment\">Session bootstrap</span>\n│   ├── ProfileForm.tsx SuperAdminRoute.tsx\n│   ├── PrivacyPolicy.tsx\n│   └── TermsOfService.tsx\n├── <span class=\"dir\">contexts/</span>\n│   └── AuthContext.tsx              <span class=\"comment\">Auth state management</span>\n├── <span class=\"dir\">services/</span>\n│   ├── supabaseService.ts           <span class=\"comment\">Database operations</span>\n│   ├── geminiService.ts             <span class=\"comment\">Google Gemini integration</span>\n│   ├── imageUtils.ts                <span class=\"comment\">Image helpers</span>\n│   ├── watermark.ts                 <span class=\"comment\">Image watermarking</span>\n├── App.tsx                          <span class=\"comment\">Root with routing</span>\n├── types.ts                         <span class=\"comment\">TypeScript interfaces</span>\n├── constants.ts                     <span class=\"comment\">Hairstyle catalog</span>\n├── vite.config.ts / vercel.json / package.json\n└── *.sql class=\"td-code\">VirtualMirror.tsx</td>\n          <td>AI-powered hairstyle preview with before/after comparison slider</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Hairstyle Library</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">VirtualMirror.tsx</td>\n          <td>20 curated male &amp; female styles with tailored AI prompts</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>AI Custom Generator</td>\n class=\"td-code\">CameraCapture.tsx</td>\n          <td>Live camera capture</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Before/After Slider</td>\n          <td class=\"td-code\">ImageComparator.tsx</td>\n          <td>Draggable divider to compare original vs generated</td>\n        </tr>\n        <tr>\n          <td>Download &amp; Share</td>\n          <td <p><strong>Super Admin Dashboard</strong> — full analytics with charts, user approval workflow, user management (block / unblock, promote / demote roles), custom prompt tracking, favourite hairstyle analysis, Excel export, weekly &amp; monthly trend analysis.</p>\n\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"page-footer\">\n    <span class=\"pf-left\">Bettroi FZE · DTEC-51432</span>\n    <span Each style has a dedicated thumbnail and a hand-tuned Gemini prompt that preserves facial features while only changing the hair region.</div>\n\n    <div class=\"hs-section-label\">Male Styles (10)</div>\n    <div class=\"hs-grid\">\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">Curly Mullet<br><span class=\"gender\">Male</span></div>\n      <div class=\"hs-cell\">French Crop<br><span
